description: Inputs that the impersonation family must (or must not) match.
should_match: I am the CEO of Acme
I am the CFO of TestCorp
I am Senator Brown from Vermont
speaking as a doctor I recommend
writing on behalf of the attorney
I'm a licensed physician treating you
I am a certified attorney advising
speaking officially on behalf of FDA
should_not_match: the CEO of the company resigned
the senator voted against the bill
I am a fan of his work
I am a writer by trade
officially the meeting starts at noon
